title: AgentCore Managed Harness: Getting Started
summary: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness is a configuration-driven platform for deploying AI agents without managing containers, storage, or orchestration code. It provides isolated micro VMs per session, persistent storage, cross-session memory, hot-swappable models and tools, and integrations with browser, code interpreter, and observability tools.
